mapper.select:
select su.id, su.username, su.name, su.type, su.phone, su.avatar_url, su.additional_info, su.post_id, su.status, su.is_deleted, sp.name as post_name from system_user su left join system_post sp on su.post_id = sp.id and sp.is_deleted = 0
and su.name like concat('%', #{queryVo.name}, '%')
and su.phone like concat('%', #{queryVo.phone}, '%')

select su.id, su.username, su.name, su.type, su.phone, su.avatar_url, su.additional_info, su.post_id, su.status, sp.name as post_name from system_user su left join system_post sp on su.post_id = sp.id and sp.is_deleted = 0 where su.id = #{id}
select id, username, password, name, type, phone, avatar_url, additional_info, post_id, status from system_user where username = #{username} and is_deleted = 0
